sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timezones (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timezones (id, event_time) VALUES (1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SET TIME ZONE INTERVAL '+05:00' HOUR TO MINUTE;
SELECT id, event_time AT TIME ZONE CURRENT_TIMEZONE FROM test_timezones;
UPDATE test_timezones SET event_time = event_time AT TIME ZONE INTERVAL '-03:00' HOUR TO MINUTE WHERE id = 1;
